name: Lymexylidae
diagnosis: The Lymexylidae (historically often spelled Lymexylonidae), also known as ship-timber beetles, are a family of wood-boring beetles. Lymexylidae belong to the suborder Polyphaga and are the sole member of the superfamily Lymexyloidea.

genus_notes.melittomma: Melittomma is a genus of beetles in the family Lymexylidae, containing the following species:
